name: knowledge-dungeon
description: Knowledge Dungeon - a local-first, mindmap-driven dungeon crawler for studying. Built on the Repo Dungeon engine.
author: McFuzzySquirrel

scripts.dev:full: npm run copy:svgedit && node server/index.js & vite --host
scripts.build: npm run copy:svgedit && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.build:web:profile: npm run copy:svgedit && vite build --mode profile
scripts.build:electron:web: npm run copy:svgedit && tsc -b && vite build --mode electron
scripts.build:electron: npm run build:electron:web && npm run build:electron:main
scripts.package:electron:win:zip: npm run build:electron && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js --win zip
scripts.package:electron:linux: npm run build:electron && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js --linux deb
scripts.package:electron:linux:appimage: npm run build:electron && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js --linux AppImage
scripts.release:verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test -- --run && npm run build:web && npm run check:bundle-size
